## Description

Describe what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (non-breaking change that improves code quality)
- [ ] Documentation (non-breaking change that updates docs)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's linting and type-checking rules (`npm run lint` passes)
- [ ] Tests are added or updated for bug fixes and new features
- [ ] Unit tests pass: `npx vitest run`
- [ ] E2E tests pass: `npx playwright test`
- [ ] Build succeeds: `npm run build`
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if applicable)

## Screenshots

If the change is visual, add before/after screenshots.

## Related Issues

Link any related issues using `Fixes #` or `Closes #`.
